_comment: RunPod Serverless endpoint for Google's Gemma 3 27B (instruction-tuned) -- Deploy D2. Fits a single 48-80GB card; same scale-to-zero contract. Requires accepting Gemma's license on HF and a token with access.
name: neuromod-gemma-3-27b

_notes.HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN: Gemma is gated: accept the license at huggingface.co/google/gemma-3-27b-it and use a token that has access.
_notes.neuromod: Verify steering/attention/logits hooks attach on the Gemma architecture (model_support.py) after first load.
